top_signals.title: Chancellor John Healey delivers speech to Treasury staff
top_signals.summary: On 21 July Chancellor John Healey delivered his first speech to Treasury staff.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: OpenAI hacking incident exposes mounting risks in AI arms race
top_signals.summary: Increasing use of aggressive training techniques sharpens threat of bad behaviour by leading models
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Key Democratic lawmakers say crypto Clarity Act 'falls short' on ethics, other issues
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: UK government probes OpenAI breach after ‘unprecedented’ hack
top_signals.summary: The UK government is probing the first known case of an artificial intelligence model breaking out of a controlled test by itself and hacking another company’s systems. Officials at the government-backed AI Security Institute (AISI) are investigating the security breach at OpenAI and whether similar incidents could occur at other top developers, a spokesperson told [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
